candidate:
method LoginFailed(st: ServiceState, email: Email, password: string)
  requires ServiceStateInv(st)
  requires EmailWhere(email)
  requires email in st.user_by_email
  requires st.user_by_email[email].password_hash != hash(password)
  ensures st.sessions == old(st.sessions)
  ensures st.users == old(st.users)
  ensures st.login_attempts == old(st.login_attempts) + [LoginAttempt(email, now(), false)]
  ensures ServiceStateInv(st)
  modifies st
{
  // Append a failed login attempt; do not modify any other part of the state.
  st.login_attempts := st.login_attempts + [LoginAttempt(email, now(), false)];
}
body:
// Append a failed login attempt; do not modify any other part of the state.
  st.login_attempts := st.login_attempts + [LoginAttempt(email, now(), false)];
